page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: A tool for racon polishing of miniasm assemblies
page_metadata.biotools__summary: A tool that bridges the output of miniasm (long-read assembly) and racon (assembly polishing) together to polish a draft assembly. It also provides read depth information in contigs.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A tool that bridges the output of miniasm (long-read assembly) and racon (assembly polishing) together to polish a draft assembly. It also provides read depth information in contigs.
page_metadata.galaxy__bio_tools_summary: A tool that bridges the output of miniasm (long-read assembly) and racon (assembly polishing) together to polish a draft assembly. It also provides read depth information in contigs.
